metadata.description: Private marketplace for the palantir-mini native Claude/Codex plugin.

plugins.name: palantir-mini
plugins.description: Ontology-first control-plane plugin for palantir-mini workflows, MCP handlers, hooks, skills, validation, and cross-runtime bridge sync.

plugins.name: palantir-ontology
plugins.description: Successor Ontology-First runtime for the ~/projects fleet — the governed semantic + kinetic digital twin (Data+Logic+Action+Security decisions) that every consumer project binds to instead of re-deriving; replaces palantir-mini.
